examples: Its huge elliptical form is enveloped in a dense latticework of steel columns.
Its latticework skin covers two structures: a large hall for operas and a concert hall for recitals.
CUSHING is a small town and a trading hub in Oklahoma, home to about 8,400 people and a latticework of oil pipelines.
The coffee shop still looks like an old bathhouse, with wooden latticework and a distinctive, bell-shaped awning.
It is hand-painted in the ceiling, carved in wooden doors and fashioned in the cast-iron latticework of the window guards.
